name: hermes
description: Hermes Agent — runs `gateway run` on the s6-overlay image, supervising in parallel: (1) OpenAI-compatible API HTTP server on :8642 (consumed by external bots, scripts, etc. with Bearer ${HERMES_API_KEY}), (2) Web dashboard on :9119 (config + API keys + sessions; Traefik Basic Auth gate). The CLI is reachable via `docker exec -it <container> hermes <subcommand>`. Also populates the hermes-bin cross-stack volume so the paperclip stack's hermes_local adapter can spawn `hermes chat` against the same binary.

env.name: HERMES_API_HOST
env.prompt: Hermes API gateway hostname (for external consumers / bots)
